channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Practical Gemma 4 Benchmarking with LM Studio
item.description: This is a submission for the Gemma 4 Challenge: Write About Gemma 4 When choosing Gemma 4 models for your local system, knowing how much video RAM your GPU has dedicated might not be the only...

item.title: My Agent Forgot What We Were Building. So I Told It to Write Everything Down.
item.description: Around turn 30, my agent loses its mind. The task we've been debugging for an hour? Gone. The constraint I whispered at turn 12? Never happened. The system hits a token ceiling and rewrites...

item.title: [Day 6] I Had an AI Look at 25,000 iPhone Photos and It Decided My Mom and I Are the Same Person
item.description: [Day 6] I Had an AI Look at 25,000 iPhone Photos and It Decided My Mom and I Are the Same Person Intro Day 6! On Day 4, I had a local AI sort through 25,000 photos on my iPhone (Day 4 article)....

item.title: Time Complexity 101: O(1), O(n), O(n )
item.description: Modern algorithms can be complex. Big O Notation helps developers measure performance by analyzing how runtime grows with input size. Understanding O(1), O(n), and O(n²) is essential for writing...

item.title: Security in the Age of Coding Agents
item.description: The rise of AI tooling has created new opportunities for us and, undoubtedly, will continue to create even more challenges. Here are some facts to think about: credentials are leaking at a pace...

item.title: I built a free IP & DNS leak checker — launching on Product Hunt today 🚀
item.description: Hey DEV community! 👋 I just launched PeekMyIP on Product Hunt today and wanted to share it here. What is it? PeekMyIP is a free privacy toolkit that lets you instantly check: 🌐 Your public IP...

item.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
item.description: OpenAI's CEO recalls a "particularly hair-raising" conversation with the SpaceX founder.

item.title: How to add automatic LLM fallbacks to your voice pipeline
item.description: Your voice agent is mid-conversation when Anthropic's API returns a 529 overloaded error. The user is waiting. Your code throws. The call drops. This is the failure mode most voice pipelines...

item.title: AssemblyAI LLM Gateway vs. OpenRouter vs. LLM Gateway.io: Pricing, security, and reliability compared
item.description: Picking an LLM gateway used to be a niche infrastructure decision. In 2026, it's table stakes for any team running production AI workloads—especially voice agents, where a single provider outage...

item.title: I built TrendingTide: Hacker News trends with AI key takeaways
item.description: I built TrendingTide because I kept finding useful Hacker News threads, opening too many tabs, and then losing the good discussions later. TrendingTide is a small tool that helps you scan live...

item.title: Compass v1.1.0 · we shipped a memory plugin that catches its own consumption drift
item.description: Compass v1.1.0 · the recall consumption fix We shipped nautilus-compass v1.1.0 12 hours after v1.0.0. v1.0.0 was the public stable cut. v1.1.0 fixes a class of failure that v1.0.0 surfaces but...

item.title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
item.description: The company named Open Doors Partners, Unicorns Exchange, Pachamama Capital, Lionheart Ventures, Hiive, Forge Global, Sydecar and Upmarket as companies that are not authorized to provide access to...

item.title: Sam Altman says Elon Musk’s mind games were damaging OpenAI
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says Elon Musk did "huge damage" to the culture of the AI startup. During testimony as part of Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, Altman said Musk required OpenAI president Greg...

item.title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
item.description: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

item.title: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded widgets
item.description: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.

item.title: Google brings agentic AI and vibe-coded widgets to Android
item.description: Gemini Intelligence will also include Gboard based dictation and form filling capabilities

item.title: The AI legal services industry is heating up. Anthropic is getting in on the action.
item.description: As the AI legal services industry heats up, Anthropic is launching its own suite of features designed to assist law firms.

item.title: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe code your own widgets
item.description: The new feature will first launch on the latest Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones this summer.

item.title: Google adds Gemini-powered Dictation to Gboard, which could be bad news for dictation startups
item.description: Google's transcription feature will initially launch with Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones

item.title: Android Auto is now one (screen) size fits all
item.description: This week at I/O, Google rolled out a series of major updates for Android Auto that include better sizing for unconventionally shaped screens, video streaming through YouTube, widget support, and...

item.title: Google announces its Chromebook successor: the Googlebook
item.description: Google is announcing a new line of laptops coming in the fall called Googlebooks. Details are sparse for now, as the tease is just a small part of various Android announcements during Google's...

item.title: The 9 biggest new features in Android 17
item.description: Would it shock you to hear that Android 17 is filled with new AI-enabled features, like improved dictation and vibe-coded widgets? Fortunately, that's not all. The platform is getting non-AI...

item.title: Gemini’s latest updates are all about controlling your phone
item.description: It is, once again, Gemini season. Google is announcing a host of new Gemini features during its pre-I/O Android showcase, many of which aim to help use your phone for you. You'll find Gemini in...

item.title: Panasonic’s new Lumix L10 is a compact camera with a focus on photography
item.description: Panasonic has announced a new addition to its Lumix camera line with a compact body and fixed lens that's targeted at photographers instead of creators making video content. The Lumix L10 is...

item.title: New Exim BDAT Vulnerability Exposes GnuTLS Builds to Potential Code Execution
item.description: Exim has released security updates to address a severe security issue affecting certain configurations that could enable memory corruption and potential code execution. Exim is an open-source Mail...

item.title: Threads tests a Meta AI integration that works similarly to Grok
item.description: The feature is designed to help people get real-time context about trends and breaking stories, as well as receive recommendations, all within conversations.

item.title: Parents say ChatGPT got their son killed with bad advice on party drugs
item.description: The family of a 19-year-old college student is suing OpenAI over claims that his conversations with ChatGPT led to an accidental overdose. In the lawsuit filed on Tuesday, Sam Nelson's parents...

item.title: Android Show 2026: all the news and announcements
item.description: Google I/O is just days away, and that means it’s time for another Android Show event to unpack all the Android ecosystem highlights Google has in store. The highlight of this year’s Android Show...

item.title: World Models: 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now
item.description: World models recently made our list of 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now. Watch executive editor Niall Firth explain why this emerging area of AI is gaining so much attention. Join MIT...

item.title: Sam Altman takes the stand in trial against Elon Musk
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has begun his testimony against Elon Musk in a high-profile jury trial in a California federal courtroom. Altman, alongside OpenAI president Greg Brockman, is a primary...
